# AI Gita LLM Access Map

> Primary UI (unchanged): /AI_Gita.html
> AI-friendly index: /docs/ai-fetch-index.md

## Recommended fetch order

1. /docs/ai-fetch-index.md
2. One focused file from /docs/tabs/
3. Open /AI_Gita.html only for anchor-level verification

## Focused topic files

- /docs/tabs/foundations.md
- /docs/tabs/llm-genai.md
- /docs/tabs/rag-agents.md
- /docs/tabs/engineering.md
- /docs/tabs/practice.md

## Notes

- The repository keeps /AI_Gita.html as the public shared URL.
- For LLM queries, prefer tab-focused markdown files first to avoid large HTML fetch budgets.
